# BubbleChart

Data-driven SVG bubble chart for @rokkit/chart. Three-variable correlation with sized, colored points.

## Import

```svelte
import { BubbleChart } from '@rokkit/chart'
```

## Usage

```svelte
<!-- Basic bubble chart -->
<BubbleChart data={data} x="cty" y="hwy" size="displ" />

<!-- With color coding -->
<BubbleChart data={data} x="cty" y="hwy" size="displ" color="class" legend />

<!-- Without grid -->
<BubbleChart data={data} x="cty" y="hwy" size="displ" grid={false} />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| data | Object[] | [] | Chart data array |
| x | string | — | X axis field (numeric) |
| y | string | — | Y axis field (numeric) |
| size | string | — | Bubble size field (numeric) |
| color | string | — | Color channel field |
| symbol | string | — | Symbol shape channel field |
| width | number | 600 | SVG width |
| height | number | 400 | SVG height |
| mode | 'light' \| 'dark' | 'light' | Color palette mode |
| grid | boolean | true | Show gridlines |
| legend | boolean | false | Show legend |

## Notes

- Uses ChartBrewer internally for reactive data binding
- Size mapped via scaleSqrt so bubble area is proportional to the value
- Compatible with the declarative Chart wrapper via shared context key
